cadence_note: EUROCONTROL appends the current-year CSV per dataset-group as new observations land; https://ansperformance.eu/data/ shows the daily groups (airport traffic, en-route/airport ATFM delay, flight efficiency) advancing continuously and the monthly ones (ASMA, taxi-in/out additional time, CO2 by state) advancing once a month. No publication calendar is published — the portal only offers an update newsletter — so the cadence is inferred: a fortnightly re-pull keeps the daily groups within ~2 weeks of the source and always catches the monthly release.
